metadata.sessionGoal: Strip mock data from admin portal (keep 3 demo drivers + their trucks, brokers, loads). Remove pay-model concept. Add load.driverPayCents (admin-editable until load completed, read-only after). Build production-grade empty-state foundation. No UI/UX redesign — empty states and the new pay field are the only visible changes.

keptSet.drivers: Exactly 3 named drivers with full profiles (CDL, medical, city, phone, email, assigned truck).
keptSet.trucks: Only trucks referenced by the 3 drivers' assignedTruck field.
keptSet.brokers: Only brokers referenced by the 3 drivers' loads.
keptSet.loads: 3-6 loads tied to the 3 drivers, mixed statuses, with driverPayCents populated and a driverPayUpdatedAt field.

stripped: Analytics aggregates (empty; analytics page shows 'needs data' copy, not zeroed charts)
Active loads on dashboard (widget-level empty state)

added: Driver pay input on LoadNew form (optional)
Driver pay display + inline edit on Load detail (editable iff status != completed)
Soft-warning AlertDialog on assign when driverPayCents is null
Block Mark-Complete when driverPayCents is null (error toast)
deferredToBackendWiring: Driver-side 'Pay pending' empty state (driver app not yet built)
'Updated Xh ago' display on driver side

emptyStateVariants.first-time: No records exist yet. Dashed border, primary-tinted icon. Primary CTA pointing to the creation action.
emptyStateVariants.filter: Records exist, filters hide them. Solid subtle border, muted icon. 'Clear filters' secondary CTA.
emptyStateVariants.caught-up: Records exist, none match this view right now. Solid subtle border, success-tinted icon. Positive tone, no CTA.

metadata.verificationGate: Every task must pass `npm run typecheck` and `npm run build` before status flips to done. No task completes with type errors or broken imports.

tasks.title: Foundation — Empty state system, skeletons, error state, copy dictionary
tasks.description: Build the shared infrastructure every other agent will consume. No fixture edits, no page edits. Pure shared-component work.
tasks.details: Agent 1 produces the building blocks all UI-strip agents will import. Everything downstream blocks on this task's completion. No consumer code changes here — only the primitives.
tasks.testStrategy: `npm run typecheck` passes. `npm run build` succeeds. Each EmptyState variant renders with visually distinct border+icon treatment. Skeleton variants animate via pulse. ErrorState retry button fires onRetry callback. empty-copy.ts exports a typed EMPTY_COPY record covering every surface listed in subtask 1.4. KpiCard with trend=null renders without the trend pill.

subtasks.title: Extend EmptyState with variant prop
subtasks.description: Add `variant?: 'first-time' | 'filter' | 'caught-up'` prop, default 'first-time'. Vary border style and icon background tint per variant. No layout changes. Keep the existing API (icon, title, description, action, className) intact — variant is purely additive.
acceptanceCriteria: EmptyState accepts `variant` prop with the three enumerated values
'first-time' renders dashed border + primary-tinted icon bg (matches current visual)
'filter' renders solid subtle border + muted icon bg
'caught-up' renders solid subtle border + success-tinted icon bg
Omitting `variant` defaults to 'first-time' — zero regressions on existing call sites

subtasks.title: Create Skeleton primitive and variants
subtasks.description: New file src/components/common/Skeleton.tsx. Exports: <Skeleton className>, <TableSkeleton rows cols>, <KpiSkeleton>, <CardSkeleton>, <ChartSkeleton aspect>. Uses existing tw-animate-css pulse animation.
acceptanceCriteria: Base <Skeleton> renders a rounded rect with pulse animation
<TableSkeleton rows={N} cols={M}> renders N rows × M cells of gray bars
<KpiSkeleton> matches KpiCard dimensions (~84px tall, full-width)
<CardSkeleton> renders generic card-shaped pulse
<ChartSkeleton aspect='16/9'> honors aspect ratio via aspect-ratio CSS
All variants respect className prop for override

subtasks.title: Create ErrorState component
subtasks.description: New file src/components/common/ErrorState.tsx. Visual family matches EmptyState (centered icon + title + description). Adds Retry button and optional collapsed technical-details disclosure.
acceptanceCriteria: Props: `title: string`, `description?: string`, `onRetry?: () => void`, `technicalDetails?: string`
Retry button only renders when onRetry provided
Technical details collapsed by default, disclosed on click
Uses --danger color tokens for icon tint

subtasks.title: Create empty-copy.ts dictionary
subtasks.description: New file src/lib/empty-copy.ts exporting EMPTY_COPY record. Centralized source of truth for every empty-state string in the admin app. Keyed by surface. Each entry: { title, description, ctaLabel?, ctaHref?, variant }.
acceptanceCriteria: EMPTY_COPY typed as `Record<SurfaceKey, EmptyCopy>`

Covers at minimum: dashboard.activeLoads, dashboard.expiringDocs, dashboard.activity, dashboard.onboardingQueue, dashboard.liveFleet, drivers.filter, drivers.pending, trucks.firstTime, trucks.filter, brokers.firstTime, brokers.filter, loads.firstTime, loads.filter, load.breadcrumbs, invoices.firstTime, invoiceNew.noUnbilled, pay.firstTime, documents.firstTime, analytics.needsData, tracking.firstTime, notifications.firstTime, settings.audit.firstTime, settings.integrations.none
Every entry has non-empty title and description
Entries with CTAs have both ctaLabel and ctaHref set
All copy answers WHAT appears here + HOW to get it there — never 'No data'

subtasks.title: KpiCard null-trend support
subtasks.description: Update KpiCard to accept `trend: Trend | null`. When null, hide the trend pill entirely. Prevents day-1 '+0% vs last week' nonsense when prior-period sample is empty.
acceptanceCriteria: Trend prop type widens to `Trend | null`
When null, trend pill DOM is omitted entirely (not just hidden)
Existing non-null trend rendering unchanged
All current KpiCard call sites still typecheck

tasks.title: Dashboard strip — wire 5 widgets to empty states
tasks.description: Strip all fixture data from /admin/dashboard and replace with EmptyState renders using Task 1's variant system and copy dictionary. Zeroed KPIs with trend pills suppressed.
tasks.details: Dashboard is Gary's landing page. On day-1 prod, every widget must render a sensible empty state with correct tonal variant (first-time for never-had-data, caught-up for win states like 'nothing expiring', 'no pending approvals').
tasks.testStrategy: Navigate to /admin/dashboard. All four KPIs show 0 with no trend pill. Active Loads widget shows first-time empty with 'New load' CTA. Expiring Soon shows caught-up empty. Recent Activity shows first-time empty. Onboarding Queue shows caught-up empty. Live Fleet shows tracking.firstTime copy. typecheck + build pass.

subtasks.title: Strip dashboard fixtures
subtasks.description: In src/lib/fixtures/dashboard.ts: FIXTURE_KPIS all numeric fields set to 0, all trend objects set to null. FIXTURE_ACTIVE_LOADS = []. FIXTURE_EXPIRING_DOCS = []. FIXTURE_ACTIVITY = []. FIXTURE_PENDING_ONBOARDING_COUNT = 0. Preserve exported type definitions — types stay, values go to zero/empty.
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 FIXTURE_* exports updated to zero/empty
TypeScript types for each remain intact and exported
KpiTrends type widened to allow null per trend field (or FIXTURE_KPIS.trends typed to reflect null values)

subtasks.title: Wire Active Loads widget to first-time empty state
subtasks.description: In src/routes/admin/dashboard.tsx ActiveLoadsWidget: when loads array empty, render <EmptyState variant='first-time'> using empty-copy.ts dashboard.activeLoads entry.
acceptanceCriteria: Empty branch renders EmptyState with 'first-time' variant
Title and description sourced from EMPTY_COPY.dashboard.activeLoads
CTA button links to /admin/loads/new

subtasks.title: Wire Expiring Soon widget to caught-up empty state
subtasks.description: ExpiringSoonWidget renders <EmptyState variant='caught-up'> using dashboard.expiringDocs copy when docs array empty.
acceptanceCriteria: Uses 'caught-up' variant
Title conveys win state ('Nothing expiring' or similar)
No CTA

subtasks.title: Wire Recent Activity widget to first-time empty state
subtasks.description: RecentActivityWidget renders EmptyState when activity array empty.
acceptanceCriteria: Uses 'first-time' variant
Copy from EMPTY_COPY.dashboard.activity
No primary CTA — activity populates automatically as users work

subtasks.title: Wire Onboarding Queue card to caught-up state (already present, convert to variant prop)
subtasks.description: OnboardingQueueCard's existing empty branch already exists — convert to use variant='caught-up' and pull copy from EMPTY_COPY.dashboard.onboardingQueue.
acceptanceCriteria: Uses 'caught-up' variant
Copy migrated from inline strings to empty-copy.ts
CTA ('Invite driver') still present and links to /admin/drivers

subtasks.title: Live Fleet widget empty copy
subtasks.description: LiveMapPreview replaces its placeholder-map + 'X drivers reporting' text with tracking.firstTime copy when zero active drivers. Keep the ambient backdrop for visual texture.
acceptanceCriteria: When FIXTURE_KPIS.driversOnRoadNow === 0, copy reads 'No drivers on the road' + description from EMPTY_COPY.dashboard.liveFleet
Decorative background preserved
No fake '0 drivers reporting' text

subtasks.title: KPI row — null trends render cleanly
subtasks.description: KpiRow passes null trend values through to KpiCard; verify no '+0% vs last week' artifacts on day-1.
acceptanceCriteria: All 4 KPI cards render value '0' with no trend pill DOM present
Visual layout holds without trend pill (no collapse / layout shift)

tasks.title: Fleet — Trucks list + detail, Tracking page
tasks.description: Trucks page shows only the trucks assigned to the 3 kept drivers. Truck detail 404s on unknown IDs. Tracking page shows 'no drivers on the road' empty state.
tasks.details: Depends on Agent 4 for the trimmed FIXTURE_TRUCKS set. After Agent 4 lands fixture changes, Agent 3 wires the fleet pages to consume them with proper empty-state branching for filter-empty scenarios.
tasks.testStrategy: /admin/trucks renders only the kept trucks. Filter to an unused status → filter-empty EmptyState renders with Clear Filters action. Navigate to /admin/trucks/nonexistent-id → 404/redirect. /admin/tracking shows tracking.firstTime copy, no fake map markers.

subtasks.title: Trucks list — filter-empty branching
subtasks.description: When filtered rows empty but FIXTURE_TRUCKS has data: render <EmptyState variant='filter'> with Clear Filters CTA. When FIXTURE_TRUCKS itself is empty (edge case): render first-time with Add Truck CTA.
acceptanceCriteria: Two-tier branching: totalCount vs filtered.length
Filter variant copy from EMPTY_COPY.trucks.filter
First-time variant copy from EMPTY_COPY.trucks.firstTime
Clear Filters action resets filter and search state

subtasks.title: Truck detail 404 handling
subtasks.description: In /admin/trucks/$truckId: if requested truckId not in FIXTURE_TRUCKS, render a not-found state with link back to /admin/trucks. Uses TanStack Router notFoundComponent pattern or inline check.
acceptanceCriteria: Unknown truckId renders not-found UI (not a blank page)
Link back to /admin/trucks visible
Known truckId renders normally

subtasks.title: Tracking page empty state
subtasks.description: Strip any fixture imports from /admin/tracking. When zero active drivers on road, render tracking.firstTime empty state. Map placeholder preserved as backdrop if it exists.
acceptanceCriteria: No fixture data visible
tracking.firstTime copy from EMPTY_COPY
Page does not crash on zero-data

tasks.title: Drivers + Dispatch — fixture trim, pay-model removal, new driverPayCents field
tasks.description: The largest task. Owns the fixture trim for drivers/loads/brokers/trucks. Removes pay-model from data + UI. Adds the new load.driverPayCents field across LoadNew, Load detail, and driver detail aggregation. Implements soft-warning and completion-block rules.
tasks.details: Agent 4 is the blocker for Agent 3 (fleet needs trimmed FIXTURE_TRUCKS). Prioritize subtasks 4.1-4.5 (fixture trim) first so Agent 3 can unblock, then tackle UI changes.
tasks.testStrategy: Drivers page shows exactly 3 named drivers with no Pay column. Invite dialog has only email + hireDate. Loads page shows their 3-6 loads with driverPayCents visible. Creating a new load surfaces a Driver pay input. Assigning a driver with pay blank triggers a soft-warning AlertDialog (Continue / Cancel). Attempting to mark a load completed with pay blank shows an error toast and does not transition. Load detail allows inline pay edit while status != completed; after completed, field is read-only and shows 'Updated Xh ago' meta when applicable. typecheck + build pass.

subtasks.title: Trim FIXTURE_DRIVERS to 3 drivers
subtasks.description: Replace FIXTURE_DRIVERS with exactly 3 driver entries. Each: full name, realistic email and phone, city/state, CDL number+class+state+expiration, medical card expiration, assignedTruck ref, loadsThisYear count, status ('active' for all 3). Delete payModel and payRate fields from every entry and from the FixtureDriver type.
acceptanceCriteria: FIXTURE_DRIVERS.length === 3
Each driver has all non-pay fields populated (no undefined)
FixtureDriver type no longer includes payModel, payRate
Exports PAY_MODEL_LABEL and formatPayRate removed from drivers.ts
All 3 drivers have status === 'active'
All 3 have an assignedTruck set

subtasks.title: Trim FIXTURE_LOADS and add driverPayCents + driverPayUpdatedAt
subtasks.description: Replace FIXTURE_LOADS with 3-6 loads, each tied to one of the kept 3 drivers. Mixed statuses: at least one 'completed' (with driverPayCents set), at least one active (e.g. 'en_route_delivery' with driverPayCents set), at least one 'assigned' (driverPayCents may be null to exercise empty-pay UI). Add driverPayCents (int|null) and driverPayUpdatedAt (ISO string|null) fields to FixtureLoad type and every load entry.
acceptanceCriteria: FIXTURE_LOADS length between 3 and 6 inclusive
Every load.driverId references one of the 3 kept drivers
FixtureLoad type includes driverPayCents: number | null
FixtureLoad type includes driverPayUpdatedAt: string | null
At least one completed load with non-null driverPayCents
At least one in-flight load with non-null driverPayCents
At least one assigned load with driverPayCents === null (to exercise soft-warning UI)
Realistic pay values (e.g. 45000, 87500, 120000 cents)

subtasks.title: Trim FIXTURE_BROKERS to referenced brokers only
subtasks.description: Reduce FIXTURE_BROKERS to just the brokers referenced by the kept loads' brokerId field (2-3 brokers typically).
acceptanceCriteria: Every load.brokerId references an entry in FIXTURE_BROKERS
No orphaned broker entries
Each broker has realistic MC/DOT, contact, payment terms

subtasks.title: Trim FIXTURE_TRUCKS to assigned trucks only
subtasks.description: Reduce FIXTURE_TRUCKS to just the trucks referenced by the 3 drivers' assignedTruck field.
acceptanceCriteria: Every driver.assignedTruck.unitNumber references an entry in FIXTURE_TRUCKS
No orphaned truck entries
Each truck has VIN, make/model/year, plates, expirations

subtasks.title: Simplify InviteDriverDialog — remove pay model / pay rate fields
subtasks.description: In src/components/forms/InviteDriverDialog.tsx: remove payModel and payRate from InviteDriverValues type. Remove the Pay Model Select and Pay Rate Input FormField blocks (approx lines 121-181). Remove PAY_MODEL_HINT and payLabel() helper. Form reduces to email + hireDate only.
acceptanceCriteria: InviteDriverValues has exactly { email, hireDate }
Dialog form renders only 2 input fields
No PAY_MODEL_HINT, payLabel export remaining
onSubmit signature updated accordingly
All consumers of InviteDriverDialog still typecheck

subtasks.title: Drivers list — remove Pay column and stat
subtasks.description: In src/routes/admin/drivers/index.tsx: remove Pay TableHead + TableCell from DriversTable. Remove Pay stat quadrant from DriverCard. Remove imports of PAY_MODEL_LABEL, formatPayRate, Wallet (if unused elsewhere in the file).
acceptanceCriteria: Table has no Pay column
Grid card has no Pay quadrant (replaced cleanly — no layout gap)
No import of PAY_MODEL_LABEL or formatPayRate remains
Visual spacing of remaining columns/cards still balanced

subtasks.title: Driver detail — remove pay model, add per-period pay aggregation
subtasks.description: In /admin/drivers/$driverId.tsx: remove any pay model / pay rate display. Add a 'Pay this period' read-only block showing sum of driverPayCents across the driver's loads this week/month (or whatever period the detail page uses). If driver has no loads with pay set → render EmptyState caught-up 'No pay yet this period'.
acceptanceCriteria: No pay model or pay rate strings rendered
Pay this period block aggregates load.driverPayCents correctly
Handles divider-by-zero / no loads case with empty state
404 for unknown driverId redirects or renders not-found

subtasks.title: LoadNew — add Driver pay input
subtasks.description: In /admin/loads/new.tsx: add a Driver pay dollar input. Optional (not blocking form submission). Helper text: 'Optional. Required before load can be marked completed.' Stores cents (convert from display dollars on submit).

Input type number with 0.01 step, min 0
Helper text present

subtasks.title: LoadNew — soft-warning dialog on assign when pay blank
subtasks.description: When form submits with driverId assigned AND driverPayCents is null/blank: intercept with an AlertDialog 'Driver pay isn't set yet. Continue anyway?' [Cancel] [Continue anyway]. Continue completes submission; Cancel returns to form with focus on pay input.

No dialog when pay is set, regardless of assignment

Continue proceeds with form submission

subtasks.title: Load detail — driver pay display with inline edit
subtasks.description: In /admin/loads/$loadId.tsx: display driverPayCents as a prominent dollar value. If load.status !== 'completed', allow inline edit (click-to-edit or edit icon). On save, update load.driverPayCents and set driverPayUpdatedAt to now. If load.status === 'completed', render read-only.
acceptanceCriteria: Pay renders as formatted dollars (e.g. $1,200.00)
Edit affordance only when status !== 'completed'
Save updates both driverPayCents and driverPayUpdatedAt
Completed loads show read-only with no edit cursor/icon

subtasks.title: Load detail — 'Updated Xh ago' meta

acceptanceCriteria: Hidden when driverPayUpdatedAt === null or === createdAt
Visible and relative-formatted otherwise
Uses existing formatRelativeFromNow helper
Small muted text, does not dominate the pay display

subtasks.title: Load detail — Mark-Complete blocks when pay unset
subtasks.description: The Mark Complete action (wherever it lives on load detail) checks driverPayCents !== null before proceeding. If null, toast.error('Enter driver pay before closing this load') and does not advance status.
acceptanceCriteria: Transition to 'completed' blocked when driverPayCents is null

Pay input gains focus (or scrolls into view) after block

subtasks.title: Tech contracts doc — pay model removal + driverPayCents contract
subtasks.description: Edit 05-TECH-CONTRACTS.md: (1) remove payModel and payRate from driver_profiles table spec, (2) add driverPayCents int|null and driverPayUpdatedAt timestamptz|null to loads table spec, (3) remove driver_pay_records snapshot table, replace with a read-model note (view or query helper aggregating load.driverPayCents per driver per period), (4) add updateLoadDriverPay server function contract (admin-only, forbidden when load.status === 'completed', fires pay_changed notification for assigned driver on change), (5) add note to updateLoadStatus that transition to 'completed' must assert driverPayCents != null else throw BusinessRuleError, (6) add pay_changed to notification type enum, (7) add note to getLoadDriver response that driverPayCents and driverPayUpdatedAt are included for driver consumption.

No remaining references to payModel / payRate on driver_profiles
driver_pay_records section replaced with read-model note
pay_changed notification type documented
Contract for the completion-block rule explicitly stated
